title: DebtMarker
description: A deliberate frugal:/ponytail: shortcut marker harvested from a comment (agency/capabilities/frugal; Spec 348). Records file:line, the named ceiling, and the upgrade trigger so a deferral is a query, not a re-grep. has_trigger=false marks the rot risk (a shortcut with no named upgrade path).

file.description: Path of the file containing the marker.

text.description: The full marker text after the frugal:/ponytail: prefix.

ceiling.description: The named limit of the deliberate shortcut (the part before the comma).

upgrade.description: The trigger/condition to revisit the shortcut (empty = no trigger named).

has_trigger.description: Whether an upgrade trigger was named; false flags a shortcut that can silently rot.
